content_body:
Old Toccoa Farm Golf Course, located just 5 miles from downtown Blue Ridge, offers an exceptional golfing experience in a stunning natural setting.

Ranked as the #8 New Golf Course in America in 2020 according to Golf Digest, this meticulously designed 18-hole course features challenging fairways, strategically placed bunkers, and breathtaking views of the surrounding mountains and the Toccoa River.

Golfers of all skill levels will appreciate the thoughtfully crafted layout that blends seamlessly with the landscape.

In addition to world-class golfing, Old Toccoa Farm provides excellent amenities, including a welcoming clubhouse, practice facilities, and professional instruction.
title: Old Toccoa Farm
